# Documentation Skill

This skill helps create clear and comprehensive documentation.

## Description

Provides guidelines for writing effective technical documentation.

## Best Practices

1. Use clear headings and subheadings
2. Include code examples where appropriate
3. Provide step-by-step instructions
4. Use consistent formatting
5. Include relevant links and references

## Template

```markdown
# Feature Name

## Overview
Brief description of the feature.

## Usage
How to use this feature.

## Examples
Code examples demonstrating usage.
```
